title: Blue Star Foil Balloons, 18 Inch Royal Blue and Silver Stars Shape Mylar Helium Balloon, 12 Pcs Large Pentagram Party Decoration for Birthday Graduation Baby Shower
features: Blue Silver Stars Party Balloons: Pack of 12, designed with Giant 18 inch stars foil balloons, each balloons set comes with a straw and ribbon.

Premium Quality Stars Foil Balloon: Our shiny balloons are crafted with a durable aluminum foil material, ensuring durability and resistance to deformation, without leaking or losing air, strong and auto-seal.

Vibrant Party Decoration: Used for birthday, graduate, baby party, new years party, anniversary and more. These balloons can be tied into a bunch with ribbons or pasted on the wall, window, curtains, backyard or anywhere.

Easy to Use: The birthday decoration balloons come with ribbons. After filling the balloons with helium, you can tie them into a bunch with the ribbon for a more beautiful effect. The balloons should be inflated to 85%-90% capacity

Gentle Reminder: Keep sharp objects at a distance to prevent accidental punctures. These balloons are reusable. WARNING: Choking Hazard. Balloons should always be used under adult supervision to ensure children's safety
description: TAOYE Foil Star Balloon Set features extra-large 18 inch stars shaped balloons designed for party decoration. They effortlessly create a cheerful and inviting atmosphere, ensuring the interesting of the party. Parameters: Name: Mylar star balloon Shape: Star shape Size: 18 inches Material: Aluminum film Accessories: Comes with a roll of ribbon Premium Material: Balloons are crafted from high-grade polyester film, these balloons boast a beautiful star shape, ensuring durability and resistance to deformation. It can infuses your party with excitement and vitality. Easy to Install: Inflate using a hand pump or automatic pump, allowing for the injection of air or helium. Filling with helium is more effective. Balloons generally stay for 1-2 weeks. Versatile Scenarios: This heart shaped foil balloon can be used for various party decorations, such as birthdays, weddings, bridal, baby showers, graduation, New Year's Eve parties, banquets, etc. Precautions: The balloons are reusable. To prevent air damage due to over-inflation, inflate the balloon to only 85%-90%% full. WARNING: Balloons should always be used under adult supervision to ensure children's safety.
